goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '06:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the north
Make sure you get hotel type and address
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 06:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
